dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Anyway, good job finding their weakness.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Even though he's a frail skeleton...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: While we're still talking... answer my question.

dialogue.speaker: Brook

dialogue.speaker: Brook
